data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Service contract integration (parts covered)', but the evidence does not confirm that the service contract adequately covers the parts as required. The linked use case mentions that service contract customers pay only for labor, but there is no explicit evidence showing that the parts are covered under the service contract. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that parts are covered under the service contract.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Check service contract details for parts coverage
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that the service contract includes coverage for parts.
